title: PocketHive SUT Environment
description: Canonical System Under Test environment shared by registry, bundle, control-plane, and runtime boundaries.

type.description: Optional classification (sandbox, dev, uat, prodlike, team-dev, ...).

endpoints.description: Map of named endpoints inside this environment.

kind.description: Non-blank protocol/shape of the endpoint, for example HTTP, HTTPS, TCP, or TCPS.

baseUrl.description: Non-blank URI or protocol-specific authority for this endpoint.

upstreamBaseUrl.description: Optional non-blank upstream URI or authority used by proxied network bindings.
